title: Sticky top section + phone mockup for splash/logo screens

requirements.text: Make the entire top section of the TaskQueue page sticky. This section includes: the brand header (Kollect Lite logo, user name, user ID, logout button), the tab bar (Queue / Dispute / Profile), the workload filter chips (Workload, Priority, Not Contacted), and the search bar. All four sub-sections must remain fixed at the top of the viewport while the case list below scrolls independently.

quotes: make the entire section in the uploaded image sticky

acceptanceCriteria: The brand header (TaskQueueHeader) does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The tab bar (TaskQueueTabs) does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The workload filter chips row does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The search bar does not scroll out of view when the case list is scrolled.
The case list (CaseCards) scrolls independently beneath the sticky section.
No layout overlap or z-index clash between the sticky section and the scrolling list.

requirements.text: Enclose both the animated crosshair logo screen (Splash page) and the static logo/login screen (Login page) inside the existing PhoneMockup component so they render within a phone frame by default. The TaskQueue page and CaseDetail page should remain unaffected and continue to render full-width.

quotes: enclose/confine all the new screens , i.e. the animated crosshair logo screen and logo screen within the phone screen so i can test how it will look like in a phone screen view, by default

acceptanceCriteria: The Splash page (/) is wrapped inside PhoneMockup and renders centered within the phone frame on desktop viewport.
The Login page (/login) is wrapped inside PhoneMockup and renders centered within the phone frame on desktop viewport.
The animated crosshair/logo animation on the Splash page plays correctly inside the phone frame.
The Login form on the Login page is fully usable (inputs, button) inside the phone frame.
The TaskQueue (/tasks) and CaseDetail (/case/$caseId) pages are NOT wrapped in PhoneMockup and continue to render as before.
The page background outside the phone frame is visually distinct (e.g., neutral/dark) to emphasise the mockup.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
The PhoneMockup component already exists at frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx — reuse it without altering its core structure.
TaskQueue and CaseDetail pages must not be wrapped in PhoneMockup.
nonGoals: Redesigning or restyling the Splash or Login pages beyond placing them inside the phone mockup.
Adding new filter chips or changing filter logic.
